summary: HubSpot CRM contact creation with deduplication
description: Creates a new contact record in HubSpot CRM. Accepts standard contact fields (email, firstname, lastname, phone, company, jobtitle) plus any custom properties defined in the account's schema. Idempotent on email address — if a contact with the same email exists, returns the existing record with a 'search-then-update' remediation hint rather than creating a duplicate. Emits a state delta that downstream agents subscribed to hubspot.contact.* can receive via the Stoa live state bus.
